title: xiphopteris limula
intro: Xiphopteris limula, also known as the Chinese tansy, is a flowering plant native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Xiphopteris limula include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues, such as diarrhea and indigestion. Traditionally, Xiphopteris limula is prepared into herbal tea or infusions for its medicinal uses, with some also using it in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
